results.rendered_html:
mahotsava (mahā + u˚) m.
1〉 ein grosses Fest  N. 26,32 .  VID. 54 .  Verz. d. B. H. No. 1181 . mahendra˚ 136,a (134) . śatakratoḥ  KATHĀS. 27,59 . kṛṣṇarāsa˚  PAÑCAR. 1,11,1 . parirambhamahā˚  PRAB. 58,4 . Am Ende eines adj. comp.: vilambitavatseśapāṇigrahamahotsavā  KATHĀS. 33,2 . saṃjātamanomahotsavā  BHĀG. P. 1,11,32 . Davon adj. ˚maya aus grossen Festen bestehend, grosse Feste feiernd: ˚mayaṃ svapuraṃ cakāra  KATHĀS. 56,414 .
— 2〉 der Liebesgott  H. ś. 77 .
— Vgl. madana˚.
